references.text:
[FoHa03] Foreman, Matthew and Hajnal, Andras, A partition relation for successors of large cardinals. Math. Ann. (2003), 583--623.
 
 [La82] Laver, Richard, An {$(\aleph \sb{2},\,\aleph \sb{2},\,\aleph
\sb{0})$}-saturated ideal on {$\omega \sb{1}$}. (1982), 173--180.

remarks.text: Laver \cite{La82} proved the consistency of $\omega_2\to (\omega_12+1,\alpha)^2$ for all $\alpha<\omega_2$. Foreman and Hajnal \cite{FoHa03} proved the consistency of $\omega_2\to (\omega_1^2+1,\alpha)^2$ for all $\alpha<\omega_2$.
